---
title: "05_Patient_List_Responsive"
output: html_document
---

# Patient List Analysis Respomsive Piece

This report explores the impact of recent attempts to reduce ghost patients in the GP patients registered dataset

## Introduction

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(knitr)

payments_lookup <- payments2425 %>%
  select(
    Practice.Code,
    Region = NHS.England..Region..Name,
    ICB_Name = Sub.ICB.Name
  ) %>%
  distinct(Practice.Code, .keep_all = TRUE)

practice_change <- monthly_practice %>%
  filter(
    Period %in% as.Date(c("2025-10-01", "2026-06-01"))
  ) %>%
  select(GP_Practice_Code, Period, Total_Size) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Period,
    values_from = Total_Size
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Size_Change = `2026-06-01` - `2025-10-01`
  ) %>%
  arrange(Size_Change)

ggplot(
  practice_change,
  aes(
    x = reorder(GP_Practice_Code, Size_Change),
    y = Size_Change
  )
) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Change in GP practice list size",
    subtitle = "June 2026 minus October 2025",
    x = "GP Practice",
    y = "Change in list size"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
ggplot(
  monthly_overall,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Total_Size
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, colour = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(size = 2, colour = "steelblue") +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "3 months",
    date_labels = "%b\n%Y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Total GP registered population",
    subtitle = "June 2022 to June 2026",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total list size"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )


# Month-on-month change table
monthly_overall %>%
  arrange(Period) %>%
  mutate(
    `Number change` = Total_Size - lag(Total_Size),
    `% change` = (Total_Size - lag(Total_Size)) / lag(Total_Size)
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    Month = format(Period, "%b %Y"),
    `Total list size` = comma(Total_Size),
    `Number change` = comma(`Number change`),
    `% change` = percent(`% change`, accuracy = 0.01)
  ) %>%
  kable(
    align = c("l", "r", "r", "r"),
    caption = "Month-on-month change in GP registered population"
  )

```

```{r}

overall_from_practices <- monthly_practice %>%
  filter(
    Period >= as.Date("2025-10-01"),
    Period <= as.Date("2026-06-30")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Patients = sum(Total_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Period)

ggplot(overall_from_practices, aes(x = Period, y = Total_Patients)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.3, colour = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, colour = "steelblue") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b %Y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Total GP registered population",
    subtitle = "October 2025 to June 2026 (summed from practice-level data)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total registered patients"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

```

```{r}
finances_unique <- finance_datasets %>%
  filter(Metric == "Average payments per registered patient") %>%
  distinct(Practice_Code, .keep_all = TRUE)

monthly_practice_finance <- monthly_practice %>%
  left_join(
    finances_unique,
    by = c("GP_Practice_Code" = "Practice_Code")
  )

monthly_practice_finance <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
  left_join(
    payments_lookup,
    by = c("GP_Practice_Code" = "Practice.Code")
  )

monthly_practice_finance <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
  mutate(
    ICB_Name = str_replace(ICB_Name, "ICB.*$", "ICB")
  )

practice_bands <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
  filter(Period == as.Date("2025-10-01")) %>%
  select(GP_Practice_Code, Total_Size) %>%
  mutate(
    Size_Band = case_when(
      Total_Size <= 5000  ~ "0-5,000",
      Total_Size <= 10000 ~ "5,001-10,000",
      Total_Size <= 15000 ~ "10,001-15,000",
      Total_Size <= 20000 ~ "15,001-20,000",
      TRUE              ~ "20,000+"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(GP_Practice_Code, Size_Band)

monthly_bands <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
  left_join(practice_bands, by = "GP_Practice_Code")

band_trends <- monthly_bands %>%
    filter(!is.na(Size_Band)) %>%
  group_by(Size_Band, Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Sum_Practice_Size = sum(Total_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  band_trends,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Sum_Practice_Size,
    colour = Size_Band
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b %Y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Total practice list size over time",
    subtitle = "Practices grouped by their October 2025 list size",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total list size",
    colour = "October 2025\nsize band"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

band_change <- band_trends %>%
  filter(Period %in% as.Date(c("2025-10-01", "2026-06-01"))) %>%
  select(Size_Band, Period, Sum_Practice_Size) %>%
  mutate(Period = format(Period, "%b %Y")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Period,
    values_from = Sum_Practice_Size
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Number change` = `Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`,
    `% change` = (`Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`) / `Oct 2025`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Oct 2025` = comma(`Oct 2025`),
    `Jun 2026` = comma(`Jun 2026`),
    `Number change` = comma(`Number change`),
    `% change` = percent(`% change`, accuracy = 0.1)
  )

kable(
  band_change,
  align = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r"),
  caption = "Change in registered patients by October 2025 practice size band (October 2025 to June 2026)"
)

```

```{r}
contract_trends <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
    filter(!is.na(Contract_Type)) %>%
  group_by(Contract_Type, Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Patients = sum(Total_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


ggplot(
  contract_trends,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Total_Patients,
    colour = Contract_Type
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Total registered patients over time",
    subtitle = "Grouped by Contact Type",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total patients",
    colour = "Contact Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


contract_change <- contract_trends %>%
  filter(Period %in% as.Date(c("2025-10-01", "2026-06-01"))) %>%
  select(Contract_Type, Period, Total_Patients) %>%
  mutate(Period = format(Period, "%b %Y")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Period,
    values_from = Total_Patients
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Number change` = `Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`,
    `% change` = (`Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`) / `Oct 2025`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Oct 2025` = comma(`Oct 2025`),
    `Jun 2026` = comma(`Jun 2026`),
    `Number change` = comma(`Number change`),
    `% change` = percent(`% change`, accuracy = 0.1)
  )

kable(
  contract_change,
  align = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r"),
  caption = "Change in registered patients by contract type (October 2025 to June 2026)"
)

```

```{r}
Dispensing_trends <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
    filter(!is.na(Dispensing_Practice)) %>%
  group_by(Dispensing_Practice, Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Patients = sum(Total_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


ggplot(
  Dispensing_trends,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Total_Patients,
    colour = Dispensing_Practice
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Total registered patients over time",
    subtitle = "Grouped by Dispensing Status",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total patients",
    colour = "Dispensing Practice"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


dispensing_change <- Dispensing_trends %>%
  filter(Period %in% as.Date(c("2025-10-01", "2026-06-01"))) %>%
  select(Dispensing_Practice, Period, Total_Patients) %>%
  mutate(Period = format(Period, "%b %Y")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Period,
    values_from = Total_Patients
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Number change` = `Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`,
    `% change` = (`Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`) / `Oct 2025`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Oct 2025` = comma(`Oct 2025`),
    `Jun 2026` = comma(`Jun 2026`),
    `Number change` = comma(`Number change`),
    `% change` = percent(`% change`, accuracy = 0.1)
  )

kable(
  dispensing_change,
  align = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r"),
  caption = "Change in registered patients by dispensing status (October 2025 to June 2026)"
)

```

```{r}
Rurality_trends <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
      filter(!is.na(Practice_Rurality)) %>%
  group_by(Practice_Rurality, Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Patients = sum(Total_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


ggplot(
  Rurality_trends,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Total_Patients,
    colour = Practice_Rurality
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Total registered patients over time",
    subtitle = "Grouped by Rurality",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total patients",
    colour = "Rurality"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


rurality_change <- Rurality_trends %>%
  filter(Period %in% as.Date(c("2025-10-01", "2026-06-01"))) %>%
  select(Practice_Rurality, Period, Total_Patients) %>%
  mutate(Period = format(Period, "%b %Y")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Period,
    values_from = Total_Patients
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Number change` = `Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`,
    `% change` = (`Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`) / `Oct 2025`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Oct 2025` = comma(`Oct 2025`),
    `Jun 2026` = comma(`Jun 2026`),
    `Number change` = comma(`Number change`),
    `% change` = percent(`% change`, accuracy = 0.1)
  )

kable(
  rurality_change,
  align = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r"),
  caption = "Change in registered patients by practice rurality (October 2025 to June 2026)"
)

```

```{r}







```

```{r}

Region_trends <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
  filter(!is.na(Region)) %>%
  group_by(Region, Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Patients = sum(Total_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


ggplot(
  Region_trends,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Total_Patients,
    colour = Region
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Total registered patients over time",
    subtitle = "Grouped by Region",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total patients",
    colour = "Region"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

region_change <- Region_trends %>%
  filter(Period %in% as.Date(c("2025-10-01", "2026-06-01"))) %>%
  select(Region, Period, Total_Patients) %>%
  mutate(Period = format(Period, "%b %Y")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Period,
    values_from = Total_Patients
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Number change` = `Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`,
    `% change` = (`Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`) / `Oct 2025`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Oct 2025` = comma(`Oct 2025`),
    `Jun 2026` = comma(`Jun 2026`),
    `Number change` = comma(`Number change`),
    `% change` = percent(`% change`, accuracy = 0.1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(readr::parse_number(`Number change`)))

kable(
  region_change,
  align = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r"),
  caption = "Change in registered patients by region (October 2025 to June 2026)"
)
```

```{r}

ICB_trends <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
  filter(!is.na(ICB_Name)) %>%
  group_by(ICB_Name, Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Patients = sum(Total_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


ggplot(
  ICB_trends,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Total_Patients,
    colour = ICB_Name
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Total registered patients over time",
    subtitle = "Grouped by ICB",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total patients",
    colour = "ICB"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 9)
  ) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(nrow = 4))


icb_change <- ICB_trends %>%
  filter(Period %in% as.Date(c("2025-10-01", "2026-06-01"))) %>%
  select(ICB_Name, Period, Total_Patients) %>%
  mutate(Period = format(Period, "%b %Y")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Period,
    values_from = Total_Patients
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Number change` = `Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`,
    `% change` = (`Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`) / `Oct 2025`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Oct 2025` = comma(`Oct 2025`),
    `Jun 2026` = comma(`Jun 2026`),
    `Number change` = comma(`Number change`),
    `% change` = percent(`% change`, accuracy = 0.1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(readr::parse_number(`Number change`)))

kable(
  icb_change,
  align = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r"),
  caption = "Change in registered patients by ICB (October 2025 to June 2026)"
)
```

```{r}
baseline <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
  filter(Metric == "Average payments per registered patient") %>%
  filter(Period == min(Period, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  group_by(GP_Practice_Code) %>%
  summarise(
    Payment = mean(Metric_Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# assign deciles
baseline <- baseline %>%
  mutate(Payment_Decile = ntile(Payment, 10))

# get ranges for legend labels
decile_labels <- baseline %>%
  group_by(Payment_Decile) %>%
  summarise(
    min_pay = min(Payment, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_pay = max(Payment, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Decile_Label = paste0(
      "D", Payment_Decile,
      " (£", round(min_pay, 2),
      "–£", round(max_pay, 2), ")"
    )
  )

monthly_deciles <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
  filter(Metric == "Average payments per registered patient") %>%
  left_join(baseline, by = "GP_Practice_Code") %>%
  left_join(decile_labels, by = "Payment_Decile")

decile_trends <- monthly_deciles %>%
  filter(!is.na(Payment_Decile)) %>%
  group_by(Decile_Label, Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Patients = sum(Total_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  decile_trends,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Total_Patients,
    colour = Decile_Label
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Total registered patients over time",
    subtitle = "Grouped by deciles of payment per registered patient (baseline period)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total patients",
    colour = "Payment decile (range)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7)
  )

decile_change <- decile_trends %>%
  filter(Period %in% as.Date(c("2025-10-01", "2026-06-01"))) %>%
  select(Decile_Label, Period, Total_Patients) %>%
  mutate(Period = format(Period, "%b %Y")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Period,
    values_from = Total_Patients
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Number change` = `Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`,
    `% change` = (`Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`) / `Oct 2025`,
    Decile = as.numeric(sub("D([0-9]+).*", "\\1", Decile_Label))
  ) %>%
  arrange(Decile) %>%
  select(-Decile) %>%
  mutate(
    `Oct 2025` = comma(`Oct 2025`),
    `Jun 2026` = comma(`Jun 2026`),
    `Number change` = comma(`Number change`),
    `% change` = percent(`% change`, accuracy = 0.1)
  )

kable(
  decile_change,
  align = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r"),
  caption = "Change in registered patients by payment-per-patient decile (October 2025 to June 2026)"
)

```

```{r}
gender_long <- monthly_overall %>%
  select(Period, Male_Count, Female_Count) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Male_Count, Female_Count),
    names_to = "Gender",
    values_to = "Count"
  )

gender_long_filtered <- gender_long %>%
  filter(Period >= as.Date("2025-10-01"))

ggplot(gender_long_filtered, aes(x = Period, y = Count, colour = Gender)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Registered patients by gender over time",
    x = "Period",
    y = "Number of patients",
    colour = "Gender"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

gender_change <- gender_long %>%
  filter(Period %in% as.Date(c("2025-10-01", "2026-06-01"))) %>%
  mutate(Period = format(Period, "%b %Y")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Period,
    values_from = Count
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Number change` = `Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`,
    `% change` = (`Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`) / `Oct 2025`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Oct 2025` = comma(`Oct 2025`),
    `Jun 2026` = comma(`Jun 2026`),
    `Number change` = comma(`Number change`),
    `% change` = percent(`% change`, accuracy = 0.1)
  )

kable(
  gender_change,
  align = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r"),
  caption = "Change in registered patients by gender (October 2025 to June 2026)"
)
```

```{r}
age_long <- monthly_overall %>%
  select(
    Period,
    Age_0_9, Age_10_19, Age_20_29, Age_30_39,
    Age_40_49, Age_50_59, Age_60_69, Age_70_79,
    Age_80_89, Age_90_plus
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Period,
    names_to = "Age_Group",
    values_to = "Count"
  )

age_long$Age_Group <- factor(
  age_long$Age_Group,
  levels = c(
    "Age_0_9", "Age_10_19", "Age_20_29", "Age_30_39",
    "Age_40_49", "Age_50_59", "Age_60_69", "Age_70_79",
    "Age_80_89", "Age_90_plus"
  )
)

ggplot(age_long, aes(x = Period, y = Count, colour = Age_Group)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Registered patients by age group over time",
    x = "Period",
    y = "Number of patients",
    colour = "Age group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

age_change <- age_long %>%
  filter(Period %in% as.Date(c("2025-10-01", "2026-06-01"))) %>%
  mutate(Period = format(Period, "%b %Y")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Period,
    values_from = Count
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Number change` = `Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`,
    `% change` = (`Jun 2026` - `Oct 2025`) / `Oct 2025`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Oct 2025` = comma(`Oct 2025`),
    `Jun 2026` = comma(`Jun 2026`),
    `Number change` = comma(`Number change`),
    `% change` = percent(`% change`, accuracy = 0.1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(match(Age_Group, levels(age_long$Age_Group)))

kable(
  age_change,
  align = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r"),
  caption = "Change in registered patients by age group (October 2025 to June 2026)"
)
```
